title: ANIMAL CONTROL - 211info
text: DOUGLAS COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE ANIMAL CONTROL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides animal control services which includes cruelty investigations, stray pets, code enforcement, and dog licensing. 1036 SE Douglas Avenue Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 440-4471 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 440-4471 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Douglas County SITE HOURS: 7 days per week 6am-midnight Services: Animal Control Animal Licenses Other Services Offered At This Location: CONSUMER ASSISTANCE AND PROTECTION - LAW ENFORCEMENT COMPLAINTS CRIMINAL CORRECTIONAL SYSTEM - JAIL INFORMATION LAW ENFORCEMENT AGENCIES - SHERIFF'S OFFICE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. DOUGLAS COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE
